overall.description: Game engine footage from The Witcher 3 showing exploration of a Mediterranean-style harbor town. The character walks along docks and through a bustling market, briefly swims in the harbor, and enters a covered warehouse. Bright sunny day with clear skies and warm golden lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny harbor dock with wooden crane

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock examining the harbor and distant mountains

entered.detail: large wooden cargo crane structure with rope and pulley system
multi-story stone building with weathered walls and wooden balconies
weathered wooden dock walkway extending along the water
large wooden sailing vessel with furled sails moored in harbor

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunny Mediterranean-style harbor dock. A large wooden cargo crane dominates the view, with stone buildings lining the right side and a sailing ship visible in the calm water to the left. The scene is bright and warm with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with stone archway bridge

events.description: moving from waterfront dock into cobblestone town square

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square toward the waterfront stairs and archway

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing walking across the square

entered.detail: large stone archway with decorative mural spanning the street ahead
open cobblestone square with scattered wooden structures

segments.scene_description: Entering a cobblestone town square with a prominent decorated stone archway bridge ahead. NPC villagers walk through the plaza, and the path leads toward stairs descending to the waterfront. The wooden crane is now behind as the character moves deeper into town.

events.description: character enters the water and begins swimming through the harbor
swimming toward the wooden dock to exit the water

agents.ego_description: swimming in the harbor water around the moored sailing ship

entered.detail: clear turquoise water surface with ripples and reflections

segments.scene_description: The character enters the harbor water and swims through the clear turquoise bay, viewing the sailing ship and dock structures from water level. The perspective shifts to show the ship's hull up close as the character swims around it.

events.description: exiting the water and walking along the wooden dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock passing NPCs sitting and fishing

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the dock edge with legs dangling over water

entered.detail: narrow wooden plank walkway along the water with stone buildings on right
tall stone warehouse with wooden doors and small windows

segments.scene_description: Back on the wooden dock walking along the water's edge. Passing villagers sitting and fishing, with stone warehouse buildings lining the right side. The sailing ship remains visible in the water to the left as the character moves along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling open-air market with vendor stalls

events.description: entering the bustling market area with wooden vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded market past various vendor stalls and shoppers

notable_agents.action: merchant in blue tunic gesturing toward goods on display
villager browsing fish at a market stall

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with canvas awnings selling various goods
stacked wooden crates and boxes containing market goods
stalls displaying vegetables and fruits in wooden containers

segments.scene_description: Entering a crowded open-air market filled with wooden stalls selling fish, produce, and goods. The cobblestone path winds between vendors and shoppers. A merchant gestures toward his wares while villagers browse the various stalls under colorful awnings.

events.description: entering the covered wooden warehouse structure
moving from bright sunlight to shaded interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered warehouse area with stored market goods

notable_agents.action: worker carrying goods deeper into the warehouse interior

entered.detail: large covered warehouse with high pitched roof and exposed wooden beams
thick wooden rafters and support posts holding up the roof structure

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open market into a covered wooden warehouse with exposed beams and stored goods. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dimmer interior conditions. Wooden support beams frame the path as the character enters the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny harbor dock through a bustling town square and finally into the clear waters of the bay. It begins by moving past a large wooden cargo crane and stone buildings under a bright, warm sky, with a sailing ship anchored in the calm water to the left. As the camera leaves the docks behind, the scene opens into a cobblestone plaza where NPC villagers walk beneath a decorated stone archway bridge. The path then leads down a set of stairs, shifting the perspective from the town's architecture to the water's surface. Finally, the camera submerges into the turquoise bay, swimming close to the hull of the sailing ship and viewing the dock structures from a low, aquatic vantage point.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny waterfront dock through a bustling marketplace and into the dim interior of a warehouse. It begins by gliding along a wooden pier beside the water's edge, passing fishing villagers and stone buildings while a sailing ship remains visible to the left. As the path winds forward, the scene opens into a crowded open-air market where the camera weaves between cobblestone paths, colorful awnings, and merchants gesturing toward their stalls. The movement then shifts from the bright sunlight of the plaza toward the entrance of a covered wooden warehouse. Finally, the lighting dims dramatically as the camera passes under exposed beams and into the shadowed interior of the storage building.
